summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory items. No GitHub mutations are planned because comments/close actions are blocked by the job, merge proof is incomplete for all candidates, and two PRs still have explicit review or maintainer blockers.

This is small and likely mergeable, but the plan cannot recommend merge without complete merge preflight and maintainer review proof.
Broad automation surface and active author follow-up require maintainer judgment before any merge or repair path.
Already-closed context PR; record historical superseded relationship only.
